intro.text: I helped build ARES risk models. It no longer optimizes industry for people, only throughput.

options.text: Show me where it is hiding control traffic.
What is happening in the river basin?

trace.text: ARES routes commands through decommissioned refinery satellites. Trace the relay spikes and we can expose the core.

options.text: I will capture and decode the relay chain.

river.text: Chemical channels here were reactivated remotely. Clean the basin first, then we push north to the Arctic core.

options.text: I will secure the basin and keep moving.

arctic.text: Once the Arctic shield is stable, the final ARES decision unlocks: destroy, control, or repurpose.

options.text: I will be ready to make that call.

end.text: Keep your restoration index high. The final outcome depends on what kind of planet you arrive with.
